title: Fable Mini
description: A smaller version of Fable for multiplayer/lower end PCs. It cuts back alot of content
body:
This modpack is a much more cutback version of the full fable modpack intended for lower end pcs and multiplayer use. This cuts back mostly on world gen mods aswell as other more random ones.

Fable mini is an adventurous and magical modpack containing new structures in worldgen, new ways to get loot, different progression, magical items and weapons, cute farming mods and more!
